  epsneg_f128 = exp2(ld(-113))

  tiny_f128 = exp2(ld(-16382))

  eps=exp2(ld(-112)),
C:\Users\Chr0n0s\.pyenv\pyenv-win\versions\3.13.0a5\Lib\site-packages\numpy\core\getlimits.py:41: RuntimeWarning: invalid value encountered in nextafter

  self.precision = int(-log10(self.eps))
```

If you are using databricks-connect latest version today, `15.4.3`. It will rely on an outdated  numpy version 1.26.4. This is the cause. 

Then I specify numpy = "^2.1". Then `poetry update` help me to find a older compatible databricks-connect version `14.3.2`. 

```
  - Updating numpy (1.26.4 -> 2.1.3)
  - Downgrading databricks-connect (15.4.3 -> 14.3.2)
```

After that `python -m numpy --verbose` works as expected and shows
```
C:\Users\User\AppData\Local\pypoetry\Cache\virtualenvs\davidkhala-databricks-Xt0HavPi-py3.13\Scripts\python.exe: No module named numpy.__main__; 'numpy' is a package and cannot be directly executed

```
